name: 199xvm
description: A minimal Java bytecode interpreter compiled to WebAssembly.

scripts.build:dist: npm run build:javac && mkdir -p dist && cp web/javac.js dist/ && sed "s/__BUILD_TIMESTAMP__/$(date +%s)/g" web/index.html > dist/index.html
scripts.fetch:jars: mvn dependency:copy -Dartifact=net.unit8.raoh:raoh:0.4.0 -DoutputDirectory=web -Dmdep.stripVersion=false && mvn dependency:copy -Dartifact=net.unit8.raoh:raoh-json:0.4.0 -DoutputDirectory=web -Dmdep.stripVersion=false && mvn dependency:copy -Dartifact=com.fasterxml.jackson.core:jackson-annotations:3.0-rc5 -DoutputDirectory=web -Dmdep.stripVersion=false && mvn dependency:copy -Dartifact=tools.jackson.core:jackson-core:3.1.0 -DoutputDirectory=web -Dmdep.stripVersion=false && mvn dependency:copy -Dartifact=tools.jackson.core:jackson-databind:3.1.0 -DoutputDirectory=web -Dmdep.stripVersion=false
